languages.text: {n}Манипулус невольно хватается за живот.{/n} "Смею уверить вас, что доля профанных технологий во мне значительно преувеличена моим дражайшим коллегой. Они отсутствуют. К тому же, собственный корпус был бы совершенно неоптимальным местом для их хранения..."

{n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус невольно хватается за живот.{/n} "Смею уверить вас, что доля профанных технологий во мне значительно преувеличена моим дражайшим коллегой. Они отсутствуют. К тому же, собственный корпус был бы совершенно неоптимальным местом для их хранения..."

{n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

{n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus se agarra el estómago en un acto reflejo.{/n} «Le aseguro que mi colega exagera sobremanera el número de tecnologías profanas que albergo en mi interior. Y con eso quiero decir que ese número es cero. Y de todos modos, mi envoltura física no constituye un soporte adecuado para su almacenamiento...».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus se agarra el estómago en un acto reflejo.{/n} «Le aseguro que mi colega exagera sobremanera el número de tecnologías profanas que albergo en mi interior. Y con eso quiero decir que ese número es cero. Y de todos modos, mi envoltura física no constituye un soporte adecuado para su almacenamiento...».

languages.text: {n}操纵者下意识地捂住了自己的腹部。{/n}“我必须郑重说明，我的同僚严重夸大了我体内亵渎科技的数量。准确来说，数量是零。而且无论如何，我的躯体都绝非存放它们的理想场所……”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者下意识地捂住了自己的腹部。{/n}“我必须郑重说明，我的同僚严重夸大了我体内亵渎科技的数量。准确来说，数量是零。而且无论如何，我的躯体都绝非存放它们的理想场所……“

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus se touche le ventre par réflexe.{/n} « Je vous assure que mon collègue exagère énormément la quantité de technologies profanes dans mon corps. Il y en a exactement zéro. En outre, mon enveloppe corporelle serait un endroit totalement inadapté pour les conserver. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus se touche le ventre par réflexe.{/n} « Je vous assure que mon collègue exagère énormément la quantité de technologies profanes dans mon corps. Il y en a exactement zéro. En outre, mon enveloppe corporelle serait un endroit totalement inadapté pour les conserver. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, refleks olarak midesini tutuyor.{/n} "Sizi temin ederim ki meslektaşım, içimdeki saygısız teknolojilerin miktarını fazlasıyla abartıyor. Şöyle ki... Miktar sıfır. Her hâlükârda gövdem, onları saklamak için tamamen verimsiz bir yer olurdu..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, refleks olarak midesini tutuyor.{/n} "Sizi temin ederim ki meslektaşım, içimdeki saygısız teknolojilerin miktarını fazlasıyla abartıyor. Şöyle ki... Miktar sıfır. Her hâlükârda gövdem, onları saklamak için tamamen verimsiz bir yer olurdu..."

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスは反射的に自らの腹を押さえた。{/n}「断言いたしますが、我が同僚は私の体内にある冒涜的技術の量を大いに誇張しています。つまり、その量はゼロなのです。いずれにせよ、私の船体はそれらを保管するにはまったく最適とは言えない場所でしょう……」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスは反射的に自らの腹を押さえた。{/n}「断言いたしますが、我が同僚は私の体内にある冒涜的技術の量を大いに誇張しています。つまり、その量はゼロなのです。いずれにせよ、私の船体はそれらを保管するにはまったく最適とは言えない場所でしょう……」

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus fasst sich instinktiv an seinen Bauch.{/n} "Ich versichere Euch, dass mein Kollege hinsichtlich der Quantität der in mir verbauten unheiligen Technologien maßlos übertreibt. Sie beträgt nämlich null. Außerdem wäre mein Rumpf ein denkbar suboptimaler Aufbewahrungsort ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."
